id.description: Stable identifier used as the keyed-each key. Must be unique.

description.description: Optional secondary text shown beneath the label.

steps.description: Ordered list of step entries from first to last.

currentStep.description:
Zero-based index of the active step. Steps with index < currentStep are
"completed". Pass `steps.length` to mark every step as complete (terminal
"done" state).

label.description: Accessible name for the wrapping nav landmark. Defaults to 'Progress'.

completedLabel.description:
Visually-hidden text prepended to completed steps so screen readers
announce state + label. Defaults to 'Completed'.
